text:
Eligibility Code — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the monthly Medicare and Medicaid dual enrollment status variable. There are 
separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: Medicare MBSF 

VALUES: 00 = Medicare beneficiary not enrolled in Medicare for the month 
01 = Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB)-only 
02 = QMB and full Medicaid coverage, including prescription drugs 
03 = Specified Low-Income Medicare
